ProjectData.Creator: Texas Instruments Fusion Digital Power Designer v7.0.18 [2017-07-07]

Parameter.ValueText: Max Bus: 1000 Khz; PEC: Yes; SMBALERT#: Yes
5th SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0; 6th SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0;
3rd SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0; 4th SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0;
Last SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0; 2nd SVID is for: CPU rail: Command= 0, Data= 0x0;
OCL:42.00 mV [0111b]; CUR_SHARE_TH: Off [11b]; NVM_VDACUP_OFS: 0.0 mV [00b]; NVM_VDACDWN_OFS: 0.0 mV [00b]; Bit 10: True; Bit 11: False; Bit 12: False; Bit 13: True;
Num_Active_Phases:2; Phase6:False; Phase5:False; Phase4:False; Phase3:False; Phase2:False; Phase1:False;
USR2:7; OSR:50 mV [00b]; BLANK_TIME_RISING:54 ns [011b]; PH1_USR1:False; USR_OSR_HYS:5 mV [00b]; USR1:0 mV [111b];
IIN_SHUNT:0.50 mΩ [11b]; IIN Option:Sensed IIN [1b]; Calulated IIN Option:Include 2nd rail [0b]; DYN_INT_LEVEL:0.000 mV [111b]; DYN_INT_LEVEL:1.000 us [0000b]; TMAX:90.000 oC [0x0]

NVM_PIN_OP_WARN: True; NVM_BLK_TAOLOW: False; NVM_SA_2PH: True; NVM_OT_FAULT_LIMIT: False; NVM_TAOLOW_TH_SEL: True; VBOOT_SR: True; SVID_ALL_CALL: 0x1 [Only 8’h0F should be responded with ACK for SVID’s all call address]; PS_APH: 0xFalse [One phase active in ps1/2 mode]; IGNORE_PS: 0xTrue [Ignore SetPS commands from CPU]; VR_MODE: 0x7 [VR13.0 with 5mV step];
DPS_6TO5_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_5TO4_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_4TO3_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_3TO2_FINE_FALL: 0; DSP_EN: False; DYN_RAM_USR: Disable; DYN_RAMP_2PH: False; DYN_RAMP_1PH: False; RAMP: 0x3 [160 mVp-p];

TWO_TO_ONE_PH_EN:False; FIVE_TO_SIX:0x0 [14 A]; FOUR_TO_FIVE:0x0 [14 A]; THREE_TO_FOUR:0x0 [14 A]; TWO_TO_THREE:0x0 [14 A]; ONE_TO_TWO:0x0 [14]; PEAK_EFF:0x0 [12 A]; DPS_2TO1_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_DCM: False
Mode: CONTROL Pin Only; Control: Active High, Turn off Immediately

Num_Active_Phases:1; Phase6:False; Phase5:False; Phase4:False; Phase3:False; Phase2:False; Phase1:False;

NVM_PIN_OP_WARN: False; NVM_BLK_TAOLOW: False; NVM_SA_2PH: False; NVM_OT_FAULT_LIMIT: False; NVM_TAOLOW_TH_SEL: False; VBOOT_SR: True; SVID_ALL_CALL: 0x1 [Only 8’h0F should be responded with ACK for SVID’s all call address]; PS_APH: 0xFalse [One phase active in ps1/2 mode]; IGNORE_PS: 0xTrue [Ignore SetPS commands from CPU]; VR_MODE: 0x4 [VR13.0 with 10mV step];
DPS_6TO5_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_5TO4_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_4TO3_FINE_FALL: 0; DPS_3TO2_FINE_FALL: 0; DSP_EN: False; DYN_RAM_USR: Disable; DYN_RAMP_2PH: False; DYN_RAMP_1PH: False; RAMP: 0x5 [240 mVp-p];
